case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. HAILEMARIAH, SOLOMON H.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAILEMARIAH, SOLOMON H. $13,437.97 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,517.97
